subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! The breezes of polytheism have wafted from the heart of every worldly idolater. Hold thou fast unto this Tree, lest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ورقه قد هبت روایح الشرک عن قلب کل مشرک دنیا انک تمسکی بهذه الشجره لئلا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @suffering and imprisonment
